title: Operations Manager (Dental)
description:
1. Governance, Compliance & Risk Management

  • Ensure full compliance with all regulatory requirements, including identification, assessment, and mitigation of operational risks ie. NEA, MOM etc.
  • Assist in the development, review, implementation, and enforcement of policies and procedures in accordance with prescribed guidelines.
  • Serve as a liaison with external parties such as regulators, contractors, and service providers.

2. Operations Management

  • Supervise, direct, and coordinate day-to-day operations of dental clinics closely working together with Cluster Managers.
  • Ensure smooth implementation and adherence to operational policies, procedures, and systems across all clinics.
  • Compile and prepare daily and monthly operational reports ie. clinic chair utilisation, dentist leave, chair availability
  • Monitor clinic performance, including business metrics, staff attendance, and productivity.
  • Co-manage clinic leases together with Cluster Managers and Head of Special Projects
  • Lead or support other operational projects as assigned ie. cover clinics/ assist dentists

3. Staff Management & Communication

  • Work together with CMs to select, train, supervise, and evaluate clinic staff ie. probation or annual performance review
  • Plan and coordinate daily work assignments and clinic operations, including manpower deployment across clinics when required.
  • Ensure effective two-way communication between clinic staff and management, including timely dissemination of information, escalation of issues, and recommendation of solutions.

4. Patient Care & Service Quality

  • Oversee and manage patient complaints and feedback, ensuring timely follow-up and resolution.
  • Partner with dental professionals to ensure delivery of high-quality clinical care and patient service.
  • Ensure proper care, maintenance, and servicing of clinic facilities and equipment in line with industry best practices.

5. Insurance & Administrative Oversight

  • Oversee applications and administration of CHAS, Medisave, MHC, AIA, IHP, and other insurance schemes.
  • Assist with day-to-day accounting matters, including confirmation of bank deposits with the Finance team and control of accounts payable and receivable matters.
  • Gather, analyse, and report operational, fiscal, and statistical data for management review.

6. Procurement & Resources

  • Oversee supplies and purchasing for clinics, including dental equipment, consumables, and maintenance services.
  • Ensure cost-effective procurement while maintaining quality and operational standards

postedCompany.description:
Oracare Group comprises 63 clinics across Singapore, Thailand, Indonesia and Philippines.


Headquartered in Singapore, Oracare Group provides the opportunity for operators of dental clinics to become part of a leading South East Asian dental network to support their professional ambitions.


Oracare seeks to provide a dynamic and modern partnership culture built on a shared passion for clinical excellence and positive patient outcomes, resulting in superior customer satisfaction and financial performance. Our dental practice management hinges on these core considerations.
postedCompany.name: ORACARE GROUP PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
